category_sources: source_facts.description says it prevents cloud misconfigurations during build-time for IaC tools; official GitHub README describes finding misconfigurations and vulnerabilities in infrastructure as code, container images, and packages.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is checkov; official documentation and GitHub README use the product name Checkov.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links to www.checkov.io as Documentation for tutorials and examples.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository for bridgecrewio/checkov is linked from source_facts.homepage and contains the Checkov README.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions cloud IaC misconfiguration prevention; official GitHub topics include kubernetes, aws, cloudformation, azure, terraform, static-analysis, gcp, infrastructure-as-code, and compliance.
